parameters.query:
-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- AUTORISATION DE SORTIE — XDASO
-- Multi-destination : une ligne par niveau d'escalade actif
-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        d.XNUMD_0           AS numero_autorisation,
        d.CREDATTIM_0       AS date_creation,
        d.YDATCON_0         AS date_controle,
        d.CREUSR_0          AS utilisateur_createur,
        d.XDATE_0           AS date_sortie,
        d.XHEURE_0          AS heure_sortie,
        d.XHEURR_0          AS heure_retour,
        d.YHEURSORT_0       AS descriptif,
        d.XDESC_0           AS nb_heures_absence,
        Motif.LANMES_0      AS motif,
        P.VALEUR_0          AS delai_total_jours,

        COALESCE(x_direct.XSAL_0,    x_mapping.XSAL_0)    AS code_salarie,
        COALESCE(x_direct.XNAMSAL_0, x_mapping.XNAMSAL_0) AS nom_salarie,
        COALESCE(x_direct.XPRENOM_0, x_mapping.XPRENOM_0) AS prenom_salarie,
        COALESCE(x_direct.XEMAIL_0,  x_mapping.XEMAIL_0)  AS email_salarie,
        COALESCE(x_direct.YTELE_0,   x_mapping.YTELE_0)   AS telephone_salarie,
        COALESCE(x_direct.YSUP_0,    x_mapping.YSUP_0)    AS code_superieur,

        xx.XSAL_0           AS code_sup,
        xx.XNAMSAL_0        AS nom_superieur,
        xx.XPRENOM_0        AS prenom_superieur,
        xx.XEMAIL_0         AS email_superieur,
        xx.YTELE_0          AS telephone_superieur,

        pdg.XSAL_0          AS code_pdg,
        pdg.XNAMSAL_0       AS nom_pdg,
        pdg.XPRENOM_0       AS prenom_pdg,
        pdg.XEMAIL_0        AS email_pdg,
        pdg.YTELE_0         AS telephone_pdg,

        dga.XSAL_0          AS code_dga,
        dga.XNAMSAL_0       AS nom_dga,
        dga.XPRENOM_0       AS prenom_dga,
        dga.XEMAIL_0        AS email_dga,
        dga.YTELE_0         AS telephone_dga,

        farhat.XSAL_0       AS code_farhat,
        farhat.XNAMSAL_0    AS nom_farhat,
        farhat.XPRENOM_0    AS prenom_farhat,
        farhat.XEMAIL_0     AS email_farhat,
        farhat.YTELE_0      AS telephone_farhat,

        -- JAOUD (même seuil que DGA : délai/2)
        jaoud.XSAL_0        AS code_jaoud,
        jaoud.XNAMSAL_0     AS nom_jaoud,
        jaoud.XPRENOM_0     AS prenom_jaoud,
        jaoud.XEMAIL_0      AS email_jaoud,
        jaoud.YTELE_0       AS telephone_jaoud,

        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = COALESCE(x_direct.XSAL_0, x_mapping.XSAL_0)) AS chat_id_salarie,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = COALESCE(x_direct.XSAL_0, x_mapping.XSAL_0)) AS langue_salarie,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = COALESCE(x_direct.XSAL_0, x_mapping.XSAL_0)) AS bot_salarie,

        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = xx.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_superieur,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = xx.XSAL_0) AS langue_superieur,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = xx.XSAL_0) AS bot_superieur,

        '8528101210'          AS chat_id_pdg,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0  FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = pdg.XSAL_0) AS langue_pdg,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = pdg.XSAL_0) AS bot_pdg,

        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_dga,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0) AS langue_dga,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = dga.XSAL_0) AS bot_dga,

        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_farhat,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0) AS langue_farhat,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = farhat.XSAL_0) AS bot_farhat,

        -- IA : JAOUD
        (SELECT inf.TIDCHAT_0 FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = jaoud.XSAL_0) AS chat_id_jaoud,
        (SELECT inf.LAN_0     FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = jaoud.XSAL_0) AS langue_jaoud,
        (SELECT inf.YBOT_0    FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL inf WHERE inf.XSAL_0 = jaoud.XSAL_0) AS bot_jaoud,

        DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), d.CREDATTIM_0)                               AS date_limite,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, d.CREDATTIM_0, GETDATE())                                             AS jours_depuis_creation,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, GETDATE(), DATEADD(DAY, CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), d.CREDATTIM_0))     AS jours_restants,
        CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT)                                                             AS delai_int

    FROM [jbelrh].[JBELRH].[XDASO] d
        LEFT JOIN [jbelrh].[JBELRH].[XSAL] x_direct   ON x_direct.XSAL_0  = d.CREUSR_0
        LEFT JOIN [jbelrh].[JBELRH].[YSALAUS] s        ON s.USER_0         = d.CREUSR_0
        LEFT JOIN [jbelrh].[JBELRH].[XSAL] x_mapping  ON x_mapping.XSAL_0 = s.XSAL_0
        LEFT JOIN [jbelrh].[JBELRH].[XSAL] xx          ON xx.XSAL_0        = COALESCE(x_direct.YSUP_0, x_mapping.YSUP_0)
        LEFT JOIN [jbelrh].[JBELRH].[APLSTD] Motif     ON d.XMOTIF_0       = Motif.LANNUM_0
                                                       AND Motif.LANCHP_0   = 14006
                                                       AND Motif.LAN_0      = 'FRA'
        CROSS APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 VALEUR_0 FROM [jbelrh].[JBELRH].[ADOVAL] WHERE PARAM_0 = 'YDELXDASO') P
        CROSS APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0,XNAMSAL_0,XPRENOM_0,XEMAIL_0,YTELE_0 FROM [jbelrh].[JBELRH].[XSAL] WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0066') pdg
        CROSS APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0,XNAMSAL_0,XPRENOM_0,XEMAIL_0,YTELE_0 FROM [jbelrh].[JBELRH].[XSAL] WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0949') dga
        CROSS APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0,XNAMSAL_0,XPRENOM_0,XEMAIL_0,YTELE_0 FROM [jbelrh].[JBELRH].[XSAL] WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S1602') farhat
        CROSS APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 XSAL_0,XNAMSAL_0,XPRENOM_0,XEMAIL_0,YTELE_0 FROM [jbelrh].[JBELRH].[XSAL] WHERE XSAL_0 = 'S0179') jaoud
    WHERE
        d.CREDATTIM_0 >= '2024-01-01'
        AND d.CREDATTIM_0 >= DATEADD(DAY, -CAST(P.VALEUR_0 AS INT), GETDATE())
        AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT * FROM [jbelrh].[JBELRH].[AOBJTXT] aobj
            WHERE d.XNUMD_0 = aobj.IDENT1_0 AND aobj.ABREV_0 = 'XDASO'
        )
)

SELECT *, 'SALARIE'   AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants = 4
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'SUPERIEUR' AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants = 3
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'FARHAT'    AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants BETWEEN 5 AND 8
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'DGA'       AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= (delai_int / 2) AND jours_restants > 4
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'JAOUD'     AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= (delai_int / 2) AND jours_restants > 4
UNION ALL
SELECT *, 'PDG'       AS niveau_escalade FROM base WHERE jours_restants <= 2
ORDER BY jours_restants ASC, niveau_escalade DESC;

nodes.name: Vérifier Données XDASO1
nodes.notes: Stoppe le workflow si aucune autorisation de sortie

nodes.name: Fin - Aucune Autorisation1
nodes.notes: Aucune autorisation de sortie à traiter aujourd'hui

nodes.name: Structuration par Destinataire XDASO1
nodes.notes: Groupe les autorisations par destinataire — DGA et JAOUD au même seuil délai/2

nodes.name: Génération Messages XDASO1
nodes.notes: DGA et JAOUD = même seuil délai/2, email uniquement, pas de Telegram

nodes.name: Envoi Email XDASO1
nodes.notes: DGA et JAOUD passent ici (email uniquement — chat_id null bloque Telegram)

nodes.name: Si Chat ID Existe XDASO1
nodes.notes: DGA et JAOUD ont chat_id=null → branche FALSE automatiquement

nodes.name: Envoi Telegram XDASO1
nodes.notes: DGA et JAOUD exclus automatiquement (chat_id null → Si Chat ID Existe → FALSE)

nodes.name: Fin Workflow XDASO1
nodes.notes: Toutes les notifications autorisations de sortie envoyées (DGA + JAOUD via email uniquement)
